## Complete ContosoUniversity Project Source Code

### **Project Files**

**ContosoUniversity.csproj** (Lines 1-52)
- .NET 10.0 web project
- Key dependencies: EntityFrameworkCore 10.0.0-rc.1, Bootstrap 5.3.3, jQuery, SQL Server support
- Includes MSMQ notification queue configuration

**ContosoUniversity.sln** (Lines 1-25)
- Visual Studio 2017+ solution file
- Single project: ContosoUniversity.csproj

**appsettings.json** (Lines 1-13)
- Logging configuration (Information level for default, Warning for AspNetCore)
- Connection string: LocalDB "ContosoUniversityNoAuthEFCore"
- MSMQ queue path: `.\\Private$\\ContosoUniversityNotifications`

### **Core Application**

**Program.cs** (Lines 1-77)
- Configures ASP.NET Core with Entity Framework DbContext
- Enables SQL Server with retry logic (5 retries, 30s max delay)
- Initializes database on startup via DbInitializer
- Sets up static file serving for legacy Content and Scripts folders
- Default route: Home/Index

**PaginatedList.cs** (Lines 1-33)
- Generic pagination class extending List<T>
- Properties: PageIndex, TotalPages
- Methods: HasPreviousPage, HasNextPage, Create()

### **Data Access Layer**

**Data/SchoolContext.cs** (Lines 1-77)
- EF Core DbContext with 9 DbSets (Course, Enrollment, Department, OfficeAssignment, CourseAssignment, Person, Student, Instructor, Notification)
- Table-per-Hierarchy inheritance for Person base class (discriminator column)
- Composite key for CourseAssignment (CourseID + InstructorID)
- One-to-one relationship: Instructor ↔ OfficeAssignment
- All DateTime properties configured as datetime2

**Data/DbInitializer.cs** (Lines 1-251)
- Seeds database with sample data:
  - 8 Students
  - 5 Instructors
  - 4 Departments
  - 7 Courses
  - 3 OfficeAssignments
  - 8 CourseAssignments
  - 11 Enrollments with grades

**Data/SchoolContextFactory.cs** (Lines 1-26)
- Factory method to create SchoolContext with connection string and retry options

### **Models**

**Models/Person.cs** (Lines 1-30)
- Abstract base class with ID, LastName, FirstMidName, FullName property

**Models/Student.cs** (Lines 1-20)
- Extends Person
- EnrollmentDate (datetime2, required, range 1753-9999)
- Collection of Enrollments

**Models/Instructor.cs** (Lines 1-20)
- Extends Person
- HireDate (datetime2, required, range 1753-9999)
- OfficeAssignment (one-to-one)
- CourseAssignments (many-to-many)

**Models/Course.cs** (Lines 1-29)
- CourseID (database generated, primary key)
- Title (50 chars, min 3)
- Credits (range 0-5)
- DepartmentID (foreign key)
- TeachingMaterialImagePath (optional, 255 chars)
- Collections: Enrollments, CourseAssignments, Department reference

**Models/Department.cs** (Lines 1-32)
- DepartmentID, Name (50 chars, min 3)
- Budget (money type)
- StartDate (date)
- InstructorID (optional, foreign key to Administrator)
- RowVersion (timestamp for concurrency control)

**Models/Enrollment.cs** (Lines 1-20)
- EnrollmentID, CourseID, StudentID
- Grade enum (A, B, C, D, F, nullable)
- References to Course and Student

**Models/CourseAssignment.cs** (Lines 1-14)
- Junction table: InstructorID + CourseID (composite primary key)
- Foreign keys to Instructor and Course

**Models/OfficeAssignment.cs** (Lines 1-16)
- InstructorID (primary key)
- Location (50 chars, optional)
- One-to-one relationship with Instructor

**Models/Notification.cs** (Lines 1-47)
- Id, EntityType, EntityId, Operation (CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE)
- Message, CreatedAt, CreatedBy, IsRead flag, ReadAt timestamp
- EntityOperation enum

**Models/ErrorViewModel.cs** (Lines 1-10)
- RequestId and ShowRequestId property

### **ViewModels (SchoolViewModels)**

**Models/SchoolViewModels/InstructorIndexData.cs** (Lines 1-11)
- Aggregate: IEnumerable<Instructor>, IEnumerable<Course>, IEnumerable<Enrollment>

**Models/SchoolViewModels/EnrollmentDateGroup.cs** (Lines 1-13)
- EnrollmentDate (nullable DateTime), StudentCount (int)
- Used for About page statistics

**Models/SchoolViewModels/AssignedCourseData.cs** (Lines 1-9)
- CourseID, Title, Assigned (bool)
- Used for instructor course assignment UI

### **Controllers**

**Controllers/BaseController.cs** (Lines 1-49)
- Abstract base for all controllers
- Injects SchoolContext and NotificationService
- SendEntityNotification() method with overloads
- Notification error handling (doesn't break main operations)

**Controllers/HomeController.cs** (Lines 1-52)
- Index(): returns View()
- About(): groups students by EnrollmentDate, returns EnrollmentDateGroup list
- Contact(), Error(), Unauthorized() action methods

**Controllers/StudentsController.cs** (Lines 1-239)
- Index: supports sorting (name, date), filtering, pagination (10 per page)
- Details: with enrollments eager-loaded
- Create/Edit: validates EnrollmentDate range (1753-9999)
- Delete: with error handling
- Notifications sent on CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE operations

**Controllers/CoursesController.cs** (Lines 1-235)
- Index/Details: with Department eager-loading
- Create/Edit: supports teaching material image uploads

  - Max file size: 5MB
  - Stores in /Uploads/TeachingMaterials/

- Delete: removes old image file when deleting course
- Notifications sent on all operations

**Controllers/InstructorsController.cs** (Lines 1-265)
- Index: loads instructors with OfficeAssignment, CourseAssignments, Courses, and Enrollments
- Details: basic view
- Create: allows course assignment via selectedCourses array
- Edit: async TryUpdateModelAsync, course assignment management

- Notifications on all operations

**Controllers/DepartmentsController.cs** (Lines 1-183)
- Index/Details: with Administrator eager-loading

**Controllers/NotificationsController.cs** (Lines 1-71)

Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the entire codebase. Let me plan the test project:

1. Create an xUnit test project with InMemory EF Core provider
2. Test all controllers: Students, Courses, Departments, Instructors, Home, Notifications
3. Test NotificationService
4. Test PaginatedList
5. Test model validation

Key considerations:
- Controllers use `BaseController` which creates `NotificationService` directly (not injected) - this is fine since it uses in-memory queue
- CoursesController needs IWebHostEnvironment and ILogger injected
- The InMemory provider will work well for most tests


- I need to configure the TPH inheritance mapping for the InMemory database before setting up the test project structure.
